allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = [json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin] first = lines[0] last = lines[-1] print\('First step:', first.get\('step'\), 'tok/s:', first.get\('tokens_per_sec'\)\) print\('Last step:', last.get\('step'\), 'tok/s:', last.get\('tokens_per_sec'\)\) if 'val_loss' in last: print\('Last val_loss:', last.get\('val_loss'\)\) print\('Total steps:', len\(lines\)\) ")
